'''Kath Talor''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who was the wife of [[Rand Talor]]. She was found on [[Sarapin/Legends|Sarapin]] while Rebel forces infiltrated the planet around the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. A decrease in production alerted the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] to that, and in a few days, the planet was back in Imperial hands.

[[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] helped the Empire capture Kath and she was held as a captive of [[Tal Ashen]].

Her husband, Rand, participated in the [[Liberation of Coruscant (Galactic Civil War)|Liberation of Coruscant]]. When the Rebel armament reached the [[Imperial Palace/Legends|Imperial Palace]], he managed to find her imprisoned and he freed her.
